creator: unitrunker@gmail.com
text:
I followed Xin Li's advice. My ports were out of date so:

# rm -rf /usr/ports
# git clone https://git.freebsd.org/ports/git
# cd /usr/ports/finance/beancount
# make install

I got the same error as before with the quartery build. Did some digging and found I had two installs of beancount. One was under ~/.local and the other under /usr/local.

I deleted the beancount bits under ~/.local and now bean-web and bean-report tools are working!

Thank you Mr. Linimon and Xin Li.

Leaving this note for anyone who might hit the same error.
